_note: Fictional matter list. Codes follow format CCC-NNNN-YY where CCC is the client short code, NNNN is sequential, YY is year opened. References people.json (partner, supervisor, fee earners) and clients.json (client).

matters.name: Project Lighthouse - sale of Northwind Industries
matters.description: Sale of Northwind Industries to a Tessera-backed buyer. Heads of terms agreed; SPA negotiation in progress. Targeting completion end Q3.

matters.name: Project Birch - bolt-on acquisition
matters.description: Acquisition of a UK SaaS target by a Tessera portfolio company. Phase 0 intelligence complete; data-room review week commencing 2026-05-18.

matters.name: Helix - Series C reorganisation
matters.description: Pre-funding holding-company insertion and option-pool refresh ahead of Series C.

matters.name: Lattice Networks - data subprocessor renegotiation
matters.description: Renegotiating subprocessor terms with a major US infra provider. Tight deadline tied to customer enterprise renewal.

matters.name: Brindle Foods - retailer supply dispute
matters.description: Disputed termination of a supply contract by a major UK supermarket. Pre-action correspondence; mediation booked 2026-06-10.

matters.name: Kingfisher - depot closure restructure
matters.description: Closure of two regional depots; ~140 affected employees. Section 188 consultation under way.

matters.name: Westgate - 1954 Act renewals (rolling)
matters.description: Standing instruction. Currently 11 renewals in flight across the West London portfolio.

matters.name: Albion Retail - flagship lease (Oxford St)
matters.description: New 15-year flagship lease. Heads of terms agreed; first draft lease received from landlord's solicitors.

matters.name: Cobalt Energy - £180m refinancing
matters.description: Refinancing of senior facilities; new club of three banks. Long-form documents executed; CPs all satisfied.

matters.name: Marston Pharma - co-existence with US biotech
matters.description: Negotiating a global co-existence agreement with a similarly-named US biotech.

matters.name: Quill Media - influencer endorsement dispute
matters.description: Threatened proceedings for passing off and trade-mark infringement against a former brand ambassador.

matters.name: Saxon & Reed - FCA s166 review
matters.description: Long-running skilled-person review. Final report due Q3 2026.

matters.name: Pemberton - HS3 station works dispute
matters.description: Adjudication on prolongation and disruption claims. Decision expected in 28 days.

matters.name: Mercer Coaching - new consumer T&Cs
matters.description: Drafting new consumer-facing terms for online coaching subscription. CCRs / DSRs compliance.

matters.name: Brindle - data breach (cookie consent platform)
matters.description: Vendor compromise affecting cookie consent preferences for 1.4m UK users. ICO notification made; ongoing.

matters.name: Bramble & Finch - PII renewal
matters.description: PII renewal advisory for a small City firm.

matters.name: Northwind - shareholder dispute (sibling)
matters.description: Section 994 unfair prejudice petition. Settled at mediation.

matters.name: Tessera - Project Hawthorn (terminated)
matters.description: Acquisition aborted following adverse Phase 0 findings. Held open in case of revival.

matters.name: Westgate - office-to-resi conversion
matters.description: Class MA conversion of a Hammersmith building. Prior approval granted.

matters.name: Lattice Networks - Series B pref-pool refresh
matters.description: Allotment of new B preference shares; investor consents.

matters.name: Albion - executive exit (CFO)
matters.description: Negotiated exit of CFO. Standard package + restrictive covenants.

matters.name: Marston Pharma - oncology asset acquisition
matters.description: Acquisition of a clinical-stage oncology asset from a US biotech. IP-heavy DD.

matters.name: Quill Media - data subject access avalanche
matters.description: Surge of co-ordinated DSARs following a podcast controversy. Triage and response strategy.

matters.name: Cobalt - North Sea decommissioning advice
matters.description: Decommissioning security and reserve account structuring.

matters.name: Mercer - sponsorship deal (Premiership team)
matters.description: Title-sponsorship agreement with a Premiership rugby club for the 2026/27 season.
